title: Completion event
description: One append-only completion-event line from .atomic-skills/analytics/completions.jsonl, persisted by scripts/append-completion.js. This is the source record for deadline burn-up forecasting.

ts.description: Timestamp captured when the completion event was appended.

event.description: Closed completion event kind; downstream series code must never infer unknown event names.

taskId.description: Task id for task-level events; null for phase-done records.

weight.description: Frozen completion weight captured at append time.

actuals.description: Optional measured work actuals reserved for calibration.
